import java.util.function.Supplier;

class LambdaSwallow {
    void m() {
        try {
            risky();
        } catch (Exception e) { // want "JV001"
            Supplier<Integer> s = () -> {
                throw new RuntimeException(e);
            };
            log(e, s);
        }
    }

    void risky() throws Exception {}

    void log(Exception e, Supplier<Integer> s) {}
}
